steps.instruction: This protocol performs the QPCR plate set-up protocol for library quantification step of NGS library prep. --- * [Eppendorf twin.tec 96-well PCR plate 150ul #0030128605](https://online-shop.eppendorf.com/OC-en/Laboratory-Consumables-44512/Plates-44516/Eppendorf-twin.tec-PCR-Plates-PF-8180.html) * [Opentrons temperature module](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/tempdeck) with [96-well aluminum block insert](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/aluminum-block-set) * [Opentrons 4-in-1 tuberack](https://shop.opentrons.com/products/tube-rack-set-1?_ga=2.256255875.900706806.1575911292-1245111371.1550251253) with 4x6 insert for [2ml Eppendorf snapcap tubes](https://online-shop.eppendorf.us/US-en/Laboratory-Consumables-44512/Tubes-44515/Eppendorf-Safe-Lock-Tubes-PF-8863.html) or equivalent. * [Opentrons 10ul and 200ul filter tipracks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips) * [Opentrons GEN1 P10 and P300 single-channel electronic pipettes](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) --- 4x6 tuberack with 2ml Eppendorf snapcap tubes (slot 2) * tubes A1-A5: water * tube B1: QPCR mastermix
Input the respective mount sides for your P10 and p300 single-channel pipettes.
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
